name: Ripiphoridae
diagnosis: The Ripiphoridae (formerly spelled Rhipiphoridae) are a cosmopolitan family of some 450 described species of beetles. Informally they are known by the common name "wedge-shaped beetles". The Ripiphoridae are unusual among beetle families in that many species are hypermetamorphic parasitoids, an attribute that they share with the Meloidae.

genus_notes.macrosiagon: Macrosiagon is a genus of wedge-shaped beetles in the family Ripiphoridae.
